summary: The TONE trial does not exist; instead, the ONTT demonstrated that corticosteroids improve outcomes after optic neuritis. Erythropoietin has shown only limited or investigational potential without proven efficacy in treating optic neuritis according to existing trials.

Erythropoietin has shown only limited or investigational potential without proven efficacy in treating optic neuritis according to existing trials.. Answer choice: B
